gui.keyboard_wizard_ce.help.colors: Key colors: green = one binding, red = conflicts, white = unbound.
gui.keyboard_wizard_ce.help.middle_click: Middle-click a key on the keyboard to list every binding that uses it.
gui.keyboard_wizard_ce.help.search: Use the search box to find bindings by name; each row also shows its mod.
gui.keyboard_wizard_ce.help.select: Select a binding on the left, then left-click a key on the keyboard to assign it.
gui.keyboard_wizard_ce.help.title: Keyboard Wizard CE help
screen.keyboard_wizard_ce.title: Keyboard Wizard CE
